retrieved_note: Re-verified 2026-05-25 against the easypaisa Bank Ltd. Schedule of Bank Charges (Branchless Banking, Apr-Jun 2026 and Retail Banking, Jan-Jun 2026), the debit-cards landing page, and the Asaan Account and My Account pages on easypaisa.com.pk. All three cards (Visa, UnionPay, PayPak) are wallet-linked debit cards that inherit eligibility from the underlying easypaisa mobile / digital / Asaan account. Bank rebranded from Telenor Microfinance Bank to easypaisa Bank Ltd.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: No annual fee; one-time issuance fee of PKR 1,000 (incl. tax) for the easypaisa Visa Debit Card per the Branchless Banking Schedule of Bank Charges, Apr-Jun 2026.

notes: Default Visa-branded debit card on easypaisa wallet / digital account. One-time issuance fee PKR 1,000 (incl. tax); no annual / renewal fee published in either the Branchless Banking SOC (Apr-Jun 2026, p.4) or the Retail Banking SOC (Jan-Jun 2026, p.4).
Card requires an easypaisa mobile / digital account. New mobile account opening fee PKR 0. Asaan Account opens with PKR 100; Digital Current / Savings accounts have no published minimum balance.
CNIC is mandatory for account opening per Asaan Account page and easypaisa FAQ. NewGEN minor-account (12-17) holders are parent-supervised; standalone account holders are adults (18+).
ATM card replacement is PKR 500; not relevant to issuance economics.

cards.card_name: Easy Paisa Pay Pak Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: No annual fee; one-time issuance fee of PKR 1,000 (incl. tax) for the easypaisa PayPak Debit Card per the Branchless Banking Schedule of Bank Charges, Apr-Jun 2026.

notes: PayPak (domestic scheme) variant of the easypaisa debit card. One-time issuance fee PKR 1,000 (incl. tax) per the Branchless Banking SOC Apr-Jun 2026, p.4 ('Debit Card Issuance' row); no annual fee.
Eligibility inherited from the linked easypaisa mobile / digital account (CNIC required, no minimum balance for Digital accounts, PKR 100 for Asaan).
Marketed on easypaisa.com.pk/debit-cards as 'local payments, zero stress'.

cards.card_name: Easy Paisa Union Pay Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: No annual fee; one-time issuance fee of PKR 999 (incl. tax) for the easypaisa UnionPay Debit Card per the Branchless Banking Schedule of Bank Charges, Apr-Jun 2026.

notes: UnionPay variant. One-time issuance fee PKR 999 (incl. tax) per Branchless Banking SOC Apr-Jun 2026, p.4; no annual fee in either SOC. Marketed as 'travel easy, pay kaheen bhi'.
Eligibility inherited from the linked easypaisa mobile / digital account.

gaps: Neither SOC nor the debit-cards landing page publishes an explicit minimum monthly salary or income-document requirement; modeled as null (not published).
Minimum age is not stated explicitly on the debit-cards page; inferred at 18 from the Asaan Account / mobile-account framing (NewGEN 12-17 is parent-supervised, not a standalone card holder).
